reviews.comment:
No se si era por la hora de la siesta, pero me pareció que todo funcionaba en cámara lenta. No entiendo porqué los playeros se entretenían con la gente sin seguir atendiendo a los demás que esperábamos.
Está muy céntrico y eso lo hace difícilmente accesible ya que hay muchas calles que las están transformando en cuasi peatonales y cuesta bastante llegar.

(Translated by Google)
I don't know if it was because of siesta time, but it seemed like everything was moving in slow motion. I don't understand why the beach attendants were entertaining themselves with people without continuing to serve the rest of us waiting.
It's very central, which makes it difficult to access, as many streets are being converted into quasi-pedestrian areas, making it quite difficult to get to.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16076228542632319706/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRcnAtOWxnRRAB
